block.createimp.brass_scrap_bucket.toolt: Destroys _all_ input items and fluids, harvesting _Experience_ _Nuggets_ in the process.
text.autoconfig.createimp.title: Create Improve Config
item.createimp.network_manager.tooltip.s: A tool for creating and managing network labels based on existing logistics networks, and applying them to logistics devices at any time.
item.createimp.network_manager.tooltip.c: When sneaking and right-clicking a logistics network device
item.createimp.network_manager.tooltip.b: Opens the _Add Network Label_ menu to _name_ the label and _set an icon_ with an item. _Multiple labels_ can be created for the same network.
Opens the _Network Label Manager_. _Left-click a label_ to _select it_.

Right-click a _logistics network device_ to _apply the network_. _Hold right-click_ to open a menu that can apply the network to _all devices in that device's network_. In the _inventory_, right-click a _device item_ with the Network Manager to _apply the network_.
createimp.message.network_manager.no_net: Please select a network from the main menu first
block.createimp.labeled_redstone_link.to: A _wireless redstone signal terminal_ that transmits signals via _text frequency_.
Opens the _frequency configuration menu_. Only Labeled Redstone Links sharing the same _text frequency_ can transmit signals to each other.
Copy and paste frequency via Clipboard
Hold a Clipboard and _right-click_ to copy the frequency, or _left-click_ to paste it.
Write frequency names prefixed with _@_ in a _Clipboard_. When configuring a terminal's frequency, _all frequencies written in clipboards you are carrying_ will appear as quick-select suggestions.
createimp.gui.brass_scrap_bucket.filter_: No filter item set,Click with an item to set
block.createimp.brass_scrap_bucket.toolt: When sneaking and right-clicking with an empty hand
Retrieves stored _Experience_ _Nuggets_. They can also be extracted via _logistics_. Up to _64 nuggets_ can be stored; no more are generated once full.
With a filter set on the side or in the menu
Only items or fluids that _match the filter_ can be input. Any _filter item_ is supported.
When placed below an item or fluid storage

_Right-click_ to open the menu. After configuring a _filter and amount_, it will automatically _destroy_ the portion of matching inventory that _exceeds the set amount_, converting it into _Experience_ _Nuggets_. Leaving the filter _empty_ targets _all inventory_. Any _filter item_ is supported.
Request all required ingredients at once
